EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for OTT Hot Lead (with WhatsApp).
EmailTemplate.name: OTT Final Chance (WhatsApp) Email_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Final quote follow-up
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve been trying to contact you to provide you with your business insurance quote.
As I’ve not heard from you, I will now be closing your call back request.
But, if you want to move forward with a quote at any time, book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/crv2-4cb-zcj/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-on-the-tools
Not able to answer calls during the day? Send me a message on WhatsApp using 07917 515428 and I’ll contact you via message instead.
Alternatively, let me know the best date and time for me to call you or give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
All the best!
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
